result.summary: Tyk exposes documented MCP surfaces and admin HTTP APIs for MCP proxy management; the public API-to-MCP docs indicate an MCP server, while direct GraphQL/CLI surfaces were not confirmed from the retrieved pages.

tyk_dashboard_api_key.label: Tyk Dashboard / Portal API key
tyk_dashboard_api_key.setup: Go to the Tyk Dashboard / Developer Portal admin area and create or use an API key for the Dashboard/Portal API. The docs for the portal API reference use `Authorization: <api-key>`; obtain the key from your Tyk admin environment and copy it into that header. For setup and endpoint discovery, start at the [Developer Portal API overview](https://tyk.io/docs/5.10/product-stack/tyk-enterprise-developer-portal/api-documentation/tyk-edp-api).

tyk_gateway_secret.label: Tyk Gateway admin secret
tyk_gateway_secret.setup: Configure or retrieve the Tyk Gateway admin secret from your gateway installation. Tyk’s MCP Gateway admin endpoints require this secret in the `X-Tyk-Authorization` header. See the [MCP API extensions](https://tyk.io/docs/ai-management/mcp-gateway/mcp-api-extensions) page for the admin-header binding and usage examples.

surfaces.name: Tyk Dashboard API extensions for MCP proxy management
